title: Jay Miner, Atari and Amiga computer designer
content:
I’m just going to put this out there. Jay Miner is my hero. He designed the Atari 2600 game console, the Atari 8-bit computers, and the Amiga computer. But he made contributions to humanity outside of that, working on medical

The post Jay Miner, Atari and Amiga computer designer appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
